description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat, overhanging roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade is defined by a central entrance with a small set of steps leading up to a covered porch area, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, contrasting with the darker roof. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious patio or deck area, partially enclosed by low walls, ideal for outdoor living. The structure sits on a neatly manicured green lawn, providing a sense of openness and integration with the surrounding landscape. The overall appearance is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a central entrance, and a rear patio, set on a green lawn. The design is minimalist and emphasizes clean lines and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entrance, steps, covered porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated profile, window placement, and the depth of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious patio or deck area and the flat roof extending over the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side windows and the transition from the patio to the lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
